context_axis: canonical killer-whale BEHAVIOURAL contexts (activity + social), NOT identity signalling
context_label_source: published field ethograms (NOT embeddings): ford1989, foote2008, riesch2008, yurk2002
caveats: Context labels come from published field ethograms, NOT from our embeddings (non-circular); this maps documented behavioural use of the recovered units and complements the H5 embedding decode.
Behavioural-context axis only: identity-signalling associations (single-pod / clan-identity / inter-clan) are excluded because they encode caller identity, not behavioural context.
Supports context-specific PRODUCTION across more than one behavioural context at the named-unit level; NOT a claim of meaning.

Small n (catalogue types with a documented behavioural context); the chi-square is descriptive support, and Ford 1989 notes no call type is correlated exclusively with one behaviour - this is differential specialization, not deterministic mapping.
